failure_modes.cause: Temperature drop below DES melting point (~80°C) due to heating zone failure or ambient cooling
failure_modes.mitigation: Install redundant heating zones with independent controllers; insulate entire flow path

failure_modes.mode: Pressure buildup from DES viscosity increase
failure_modes.cause: Temperature fluctuation causing viscosity spike (20 cP → 200+ cP) in 54m coil
failure_modes.mitigation: Install pressure relief valve at 30 bar; implement temperature feedback control

failure_modes.mode: Incomplete conversion due to poor mixing
failure_modes.cause: Laminar flow (Re=162) with viscous DES creates concentration gradients in 0.5mm tubing
failure_modes.mitigation: Add static mixer elements or increase flow rate to improve radial mixing

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve blockage by DES crystallization
Single heating zone failure causing flow solidification
validation_experiments: Thermal shock test: Cool DES flow from 140°C to 60°C; measure time to blockage
Viscosity mapping: Measure pressure drop vs temperature (120-160°C) with blank DES
Mixing validation: Inject tracer at reactor inlet; measure RTD at outlet for dispersion
